issue_title: Memory leak in connection pool — OOM after 48h
issue_body:
The application runs out of memory after ~48 hours of continuous operation. Heap dumps show thousands of unreleased database connections. The connection pool's eviction policy is not running because the evictor thread is blocked by a deadlock in the health check routine.

Environment: Java 17, HikariCP 5.0.1, PostgreSQL 15
